name: Caramel German Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the caramels and 1/2 cup of evaporated milk together and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the cake mix, margarine, and 1/3 cup of evaporated milk until well mixed.
3. Pour half of this mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 minutes.
5. Sprinkle chopped nuts and chocolate chips evenly over the baked layer in the pan.
6. Spread the remaining cake batter over the top of the nuts and chips.
7. Return the pan to the oven and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 15 minutes, or until set.
End of Recipe
